tasks.label: Free Backend Port 3001
args: $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { $pids = $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($pid in $pids) { try { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} } }; Write-Output 'Port 3001 is free.'
